title: ABCD Ungappan Dhadi Lyrics Moodar Koodam Lyrics
stanzas:
Song: ABCD Ungappan Dhadi
Singer(s):Sricharan, Raginisri, Naveen
Music: Natarajan Shankaran
Movie: Moodar Koodam

Dai .. sir,
yevanda avan cass leader
naanthaan sir,
pesuravan perlaam boradla ezhudhuda

porukki naanthaan sir,
kepmaari, naanthaan sir
thandachoru, naanthaan sir,
evvalo thittunaalum sorana
varaadhu unnaku ? maanakettavaney

ennakum ponnugalukkum raasiye illa
yennu theriyaadhu
unmaiya sonnaa, ennaku
edhuvumey theriyaadhu
padikka theriyaadhu, ezhudha theriyadhu
edhuvumey theriyadhu

ABCD ungoppan dhaadi
enna paaru bursly body
en style-la rasikkum figure kodi
nee vandha vaadi varaati podi
vaadi vaadi podi podi
you dont know
I dont know
wy dont know ?
theryadhu theriyadhu ivanukku
yedhuvumey theriyadhu

Naan asingam, naan ugley
naan azhukku, naan un lucky
naan .. naan ..

vaadi en kappa kelangey
Vazhka ennaku theppa kulamey
needhi pidichi vilyaadiye
vazhka adhula vazhndhu paarpom vaa

oru murai vaa undha
thirunagaiyaal pennai
thirudi vittaai ennai
kalanga vaithaai kannai

enrichedMetadata.faq:
Frequently Asked Questions

Who composed the music for the song ABCD Ungappan Dhadi?

The music was composed by Natarajan Shankaran.

Which movie features the song ABCD Ungappan Dhadi?

The song is featured in the movie Moodar Koodam.

Who are the singers of the song ABCD Ungappan Dhadi?

The song was sung by Naveen, Raginisri, and Sricharan.

What is the release year of the movie Moodar Koodam?

The movie was released in the year 2013.

What is the mood of the song ABCD Ungappan Dhadi?

The song has an energetic and peppy mood.
enrichedMetadata.summary: The song ABCD Ungappan Dhadi from the 2013 Tamil movie Moodar Koodam is a lively and engaging track that reflects the film's unconventional and humorous tone. Sung by Naveen, Raginisri, and Sricharan, with music composed by Natarajan Shankaran, the song features a unique blend of folk and modern elements. It captures the essence of the characters' quirky personalities and adds depth to the narrative. This track is a testament to the innovative approach of the film's creators, making it a memorable addition to Tamil cinema.
enrichedMetadata.high_ctr_intro: ABCD Ungappan Dhadi from the movie Moodar Koodam is a vibrant and energetic track that captures the essence of its quirky narrative. Composed by Natarajan Shankaran and sung by Naveen, Raginisri, and Sricharan, this song stands out for its unique rhythm and engaging lyrics. Dive into this musical journey that perfectly complements the film's unconventional storytelling.
stanzaMeanings: ABCD, your father's beard, look at my muscular body, admire my stylish figure.
Hey sir, who is that? I am the class leader, sir. Write the speaker's name on the board.
I am the rogue, sir. I am the trickster, sir. I am the one who eats the food, sir. No matter how much you scold, the food won't come to you, you dishonorable one.
I don't have luck with girls, I don't know why. Honestly, I don't know anything. I can't read, I can't write, I don't know anything.
ABCD, your father's beard, look at my muscular body. Admire my stylish figure. When you come, bring a broom. You don't know, I don't know, why don't we know? He doesn't know anything.
I am disgraceful, I am unpleasant, I am dirty, but I am your lucky charm.
Like being stuck in a trap, what kind of life is this?
Come, my dear coconut. Life is like a boat in a pond. Play with justice, live life within it, come.
Come once, with that smile you stole a girl. You made me restless, my eyes.
